title: Introduction
description: NOC 00012 – Senior managers - financial, communications and other business services | GTR Immigration Senior managers under NOC 00012 are the C-suite executives and vice-presidents who lead Canada’s most influential financial and communication corporations. This TEER 0 role is a "Power NOC" for immigration, offering a direct and prestigious pathway to Permanent Residency. With Canada being a global hub for FinTech and Telecommunications, these executives are highly sought after by the Global Talent Stream and specialized PNP Managerial draws.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category0 – Management occupationsTEER Level0Major Group00 – Legislative and senior management occupationsSub-Major Group000 – Legislative and senior management occupationsMinor Group0001 – Senior management occupationsNOC Code00012

duties: Establish the mission and strategic direction of the organization.
Authorize and organize the establishment of major departments and associated senior staff positions.
Allocate material, human, and financial resources to implement organizational policies and programs.
Represent the organization, or delegate representatives to act on behalf of the organization, in negotiations or other official functions.
Oversee the development and implementation of financial and communications strategies.
employment_requirements: A university degree in business administration, commerce, computer science, or a related field is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in financial, communications, or other business services are mandatory.
job_outlook: The outlook is Excellent. As Canadian companies expand internationally, the demand for senior executives with global experience is projected to outpace domestic supply.
labour_market_demand: Demand is Very Good, particularly in Toronto (Canada's financial heart) and Montreal. The rapid evolution of AI in financial services and the expansion of 5G networks have created a critical need for executives who can navigate digital transformation at scale.
World-Class Financial System: Lead within one of the most stable banking systems globally.
Innovation Hub: Access to Canada’s massive R&D incentives for communications and tech.
Executive Compensation: Top-tier salary packages, including performance-based equity and bonuses.
pathways: Express Entry (Federal Skilled Worker): High priority for TEER 0 roles with maximum points for experience.
Global Talent Stream: Fast-tracked work permits for executives in specialized tech/comms sectors.
OINP Corporate Stream: For senior managers transferred to Ontario-based branches.
